name: Bodyguard.ai
description: Bodyguard.ai — real-time text moderation API for social platforms, comments, and chats.

seo.title: Bodyguard.ai — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Bodyguard.ai: Bodyguard.ai — real-time text moderation API for social platforms, comments, and chats.

when_to_use: Moderating live chat and social comments in real time via API
Detecting hate speech, harassment, and spam in streaming text
Integrating low-latency text moderation into social app features
Building multilingual comment safety filters for global communities

pros: Real-time text moderation with low latency
Context-aware, reduces false positives on slang
Good for creators and media brands
cons: Text only, no image or video support
Smaller vendor with less ecosystem than Perspective
review.verdict: Sharp contextual text moderation especially strong in French markets, limited outside text.
review.best_for: Social platforms and media brands needing nuanced real-time text moderation in EU.
review.not_for: Teams needing multimodal coverage or English-only budget solutions.
